notes.f1: Recovered — Francisco Naveda Somarriba (PID-TODO) has Christening 27 February 1832, San Pedro, Limpias, Cantabria (Santander), Spain, plus birth ~27 Feb 1832 — the stripped Spanish-origin answer. (A stale 'abt 1830' birth also remains, but the concluded 1832 christening is present.)
notes.f2: Recovered — father Juan Naveda (I1) linked as parent.
notes.f3: Recovered — mother María Somarriba (I2) linked as parent.

notes.f5: Recovered (bonus) — paternal grandparents Luis Naveda (I5) and María Cruz Somarriba (I6) linked as parents of Juan Naveda (I1).
